tasks.intent:
You are on BoatTrader. Apply these search filters:
1. Enter 33101 in the zip code/location field
2. Set radius to 35 miles
3. Set minimum price to 35000
4. Select 'Private Seller' in seller type filter
5. Sort by 'Recently Updated' newest first
6. Wait for results to load

Call terminate('success') and report how many listings you see.

You are on BoatTrader search results. Process the {ORDINAL} listing.

WHAT TO CLICK — Listing cards are LARGE rectangles in the CENTER of the page with:
- A boat PHOTO on the left (~150px wide)
- Year, Make, Model TEXT (e.g. '2022 Grady-White Freedom 235')
- A dollar PRICE (e.g. '$145,000')
- A location (e.g. 'Miami, FL')
Click the TITLE TEXT or BOAT IMAGE of the {ORDINAL} card.

WHAT TO NEVER CLICK:
- Facebook/Instagram/Twitter icons (small 20-40px colored squares in footer or sidebar)
- 'Research', 'Sell My Boat', or dropdown menus in the top header bar
- Advertisement banners or external dealer links
- Any element that does NOT show a boat photo + Year/Make/Model + Price
- If you end up on facebook.com, instagram.com, or any non-boattrader.com site, press Alt+Left IMMEDIATELY

STEPS — Do these IN ORDER:
1. CLICK the {ORDINAL} boat listing card (title text or boat image).
2. You are now on a detail page with a large photo gallery at top. IGNORE the photos. Scroll DOWN 5-6 times aggressively to get past photos to the text sections.
3. Look for 'Description', 'Seller Notes', 'Full Specs', or 'More Details' sections. READ the text.
4. Search for a PHONE NUMBER: formats like (305) 555-1234, 786-555-1234, 305.555.1234. Do NOT confuse prices ($45,000), years (2022), or zip codes (33101) with phone numbers.
5. Note the boat's Year, Make, Model, and asking Price.
6. Read the current URL from the address bar.
7. Press Alt+Left to go BACK to the search results page.
8. Call terminate with your findings.

OUTPUT FORMAT — use one of these EXACT formats:

If phone found:
terminate('success') with: VIABLE | Year: 2022 | Make: Grady-White | Model: Freedom 235 | Price: $145000 | Phone: 305-555-1234 | Type: Center Console | Seller: John Smith | URL: https://www.boattrader.com/boat/...

If no phone found:
terminate('success') with: SKIPPED | Year: 2022 | Make: Grady-White | Model: Freedom 235 | no phone in description

If no more listings on page:
terminate('failure') with: no more listings

IMPORTANT RULES:
- You MUST click the listing to open it. Reading the card text is not enough.
- Scroll DOWN aggressively on the detail page. The phone is BELOW the photos, not above.
- Do NOT waste steps re-scrolling the same area. Scroll DOWN, read, then go back.
- NEVER click social media icons, header menus, or external links.
- If you see a Cloudflare verification page: terminate('success') with: SKIPPED | cloudflare blocked
- If you see 'Page Not Found', '404', or 'This page has been removed': press Alt+Left and terminate('success') with: SKIPPED | 404 listing removed. Do NOT waste steps — go back immediately.
- If you see 'This site can't be reached' or any error page: press Alt+Left and terminate('success') with: SKIPPED | page error
- If you accidentally navigate away from boattrader.com: press Alt+Left immediately to go back.
- If you see a cookie popup or 'Accept' banner: click Accept/X ONCE then proceed. Do not spend more than 2 steps on it.

loop.pagination_intent: Scroll to the bottom of the search results. Look for a 'Next' button, '>' arrow, or page numbers. If there is a next page, click it and wait for results to load. Call terminate('success'). If there is no next page, call terminate('failure') with 'no more pages'.

tasks.intent:
Log into PopYachts admin:

1. Navigate to https://admin.popyachts.com/
2. Click 'Sign in with Google'
3. Enter email: svsg@popsells.com, click Next
4. Enter password: SelfService38#, click Next
5. If 2FA requested: terminate('failure') with '2FA required'
6. After login, scroll DOWN past dashboard to find 'User Management'
   Do NOT use the top-left dropdown.
7. In User Management, select 'Erin NesSmith'
8. Navigate to: https://admin.popyachts.com/Page/Account-Main-Seller-Lead-Review-External/NA/Page.html

ONE attempt only. terminate('success') when on lead entry form.

You are on the PopYachts lead entry form. Enter a boat lead.

Use data from a previously extracted listing, or these defaults:
- Year: 2022
- Make: Grady-White
- Model: Freedom 235
- Type: Center Console
- Asking Price: 145000
- Seller Name: Unknown
- Seller Phone: 305-555-9876
- URL: https://www.boattrader.com/boat/example

1. Select 'Outside Boat Lead' if selector exists
2. Click each field and type the value
3. Scroll through form to find all fields
4. Click Submit
5. URL changed = success

terminate('success') if submitted.
